name: Modalis Therapeutics Corporation
summary: Modalis Therapeutics Corporation engages in the research and development of therapeutics to treat patients with serious genetic disorders. It is developing therapies for orphan genetic diseases using its proprietary CRISPR-GNDM technology that enables the locus specific modulation of gene expression or histone modification without the need for double-stranded DNA cleavage, gene editing, or base editing. The company was formerly known as EdiGENE Corporation and changed its name to Modalis Therapeutics Corporation in August 2019. Modalis Therapeutics Corporation was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
